claim: Tier 7.1j localized the broader NAB gap: v2.3 has better event-F1/window recall than rolling z-score but loses on false-positive/NAB-style pressure; the result is threshold/false-positive-policy sensitive rather than a confirmed public usefulness win.
caveat: Software failure analysis only; not public usefulness proof, not a promoted mechanism, not a baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
